title: Faculty of Engineering and Natural Sciences
content: Faculty of Engineering and Natural Sciences Electrical and Electronic Engineering Okan Homepage Education Academic Units Faculties Faculty of Engineering and Natural Sciences Departments Electrical and Electronics Engineering MENU The Department of Electrical and Electronics Engineering, which was established in 2006-2007 academic year at the Akfırat campus of our university, is ambitious to provide quality education in accordance with the requirements of the day with its young and dynamic academicians as well as experienced academicians. The courses related to electricity, electronics, computer and communication, which are the 4 basic building blocks of technology, which have entered every sector today and are impossible to give up, are given to our students during their education. Our education content is organised not only to cover theoretical knowledge but also to give our students the opportunity to practice and see the results. For this purpose, fully equipped laboratories with good technological infrastructure and technical equipment are available to our students. In the Department of Electrical and Electronics Engineering, our students have the opportunity to practice with logic circuits and basic electronics laboratories in the first two years of their education. In the third year, our students practice intensively with application-oriented communication, design with FPGA, microcontroller, electrical machines and power electronics laboratories. In the last year of their education, our students have the opportunity to work on advanced electrical and electronic subjects with PCB design and integrated circuit design laboratories. en tr
